sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105055" key="tri/mnous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-μνους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ουν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μνᾶ</etym>) <sense id="n105055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worth</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weighing three minae,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.165</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
